RESPONS3E TO OPPOS TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS FILED BY PETITIONER GOHARI MD, GEETI PARSA AS TO RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF CONSUME R AFFAIRS

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE KAHN DISCLOSED THAT BEING A JUDGE FOR 11 YEARS, HIS FOCUS WAS ON COLLOBORATIVE COURT, WHEREIN TREATMENT WERE PROVIDED ON PROCESSING CRIMINAL CASES. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER GEETI GOHARI'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMNUS IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS NOT SHOWN THAT REVOKING HER LICENSE IS GROSSLY EXCESSIVE OR A MANIFEST ABUSE OF DISCRETION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Peremptry Writ Of Mandamnus
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATHLEEN L. MORGAN, TEL. NO. 994-1342 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER WITH CLIENT ALSO PRESENT IN COURT;
ATTY. SUSAN K. MEADOWS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5552 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; JUDGE KAHN DISCLOSED THAT BEING A JUDGE FOR 11 YEARS, HIS FOCUS WAS ON COLLOBORATIVE COURT WHEREIN TREATMENT WERE PROVIDED ON PROCESSING CRIMINAL CASES. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER GEETI GOHARI'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamnus IS Denied. Petitioner has not shown that revoking her license is grossly excessive or a manifest abuse of discretion. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
